FR-001.title: A folded phase never renders a near-zero duration; it renders a folded note

FR-002.title: The folded note names the nearest earlier non-folded phase (folded into Specify)

FR-003.title: Folded detection derived once in the shared step-history derivation, read as a flag
tests: src/features/specs/__tests__/stepHistoryDerivation.test.ts::flags the folded plan and tasks steps

FR-004.title: Only the deterministic fast-path signature reads as folded; everything else unchanged
tests: src/features/specs/__tests__/stepHistoryDerivation.test.ts::does not flag a sub-second step that is not adjacent
src/features/specs/__tests__/stepHistoryDerivation.test.ts::does not flag any step of a normal-paced run

FR-005.title: A same-instant fold also reads as folded despite the untrusted span

FR-006.title: Folded phases still count as measured; coverage and total elapsed unchanged
tests: src/features/specs/__tests__/stepHistoryDerivation.test.ts::counts the folded steps as measured timing coverage

FR-007.title: A folded phase is visually distinct from measured phases

context: constraint: one fact one derivation — folded flag derived only in stepHistoryDerivation
constraint: run-timing coverage and elapsed totals unchanged
intent: Present fast-path folded plan/tasks phases as folded into Specify instead of a misleading <1s duration
expectations: No change to timing coverage counts or total elapsed
No change to PhasesCard (folded steps already render no events there)
No new setting or toggle — folded detection is built-in
approach: Derive a folded flag once in deriveStepHistory from the deterministic fast-path signature (extension-stamped pair within 1s, adjacent to the previous step's close); OverviewTiming renders 'folded into Specify' with a distinct visual instead of a duration. No schema, coverage, or elapsed-total changes.

decisions.decision: Derive folded in deriveStepHistory, exposed as a flag on StepHistoryEntry
decisions.why: One fact one derivation; the module already owns spans and trust
decisions.rejected: Renderer-side near-zero threshold (would drift across surfaces)

decisions.decision: Fold window 1000ms on both own span and gap to previous close; anchored to the stamped pair, not the derived completedAt
decisions.why: Fold chain stamps land under 350ms apart while real phases take multiple seconds; derived close can absorb idle time before implement
decisions.rejected: Span-only check or classification.verdict as the signal

decisions.why: A same-instant fold is untrusted but still a fold; provenance vs measurability

plan.summary: Plan: single folded derivation + Overview strip label; docs, stories, tests scoped
plan.key_finding: The folded tasks step derived close can be the next step start minutes later, so detection must anchor on the stamped pair itself

tasks.summary: 10 tasks across 5 phases in 6 waves; derivation first, render+style parallel, docs/stories polish

implement.summary: Folded flag derived once + Overview folded-into-Specify rendering; 10/10 tasks, suite green

T001.did: Derived folded flag in deriveStepHistory (1s fold window, stamped-pair + adjacency signature) and added folded?: boolean to StepHistoryEntry

T002.did: Mirrored folded?: boolean on the webview StepHistoryEntry

T003.did: Pinned folded derivation: fold flags plan/tasks not specify, same-instant fold folded+untrusted, non-adjacent and ai-start spans not folded, normal run unflagged (52 tests green)

T004.did: OverviewTiming renders 'folded into <anchor>' for folded phases (duration suppressed, is-folded class, anchor = nearest earlier non-folded phase)

T005.did: Styled folded phases: hollow success dot (inset ring), italic body-token folded note

T006.did: Component tests pin folded rendering: folded into Specify note, no <1s, is-folded classes, measured phases untouched, anchorless fallback (12 tests green)

T007.did: Added DossierFastPathFolded story: folded plan/tasks with hollow dots and folded-into-Specify notes

T008.did: Documented folded-phase timing semantics (fold signature, folded-vs-trusted, unchanged coverage) in the viewer state machine doc

T009.did: Root CHANGELOG Unreleased entry for the folded-phase label fix
